name: 01 May 2026

desc: I officially joined [Apple MLR](https://machinelearning.apple.com/) as a full-time employee.

name: 01 January 2025
desc: I am joining the Technical University of Denmark as a postdoc, and I will also be working part-time at Apple MLR.
